page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.24xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T95 processors running at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 96 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-CPU ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This hardware profile is optimized for compute-heavy workloads that require high parallel processing capabilities rather than massive memory footprints. The server does not include local NVMe storage or GPU accelerators, meaning storage must be provisioned via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high compute density make this instance suitable for CPU-bound workloads. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs reduces overhead for deployments that rely entirely on network storage and CPU processing. Appropriate workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, large-scale build systems, and highly parallelized compute tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 96 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9T95 processors running at 2.25 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for highly parallel, CPU-bound workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for deployments requiring dense, dedicated compute resources without the added cost of bundled local storage or graphics hardware. Suitable workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, and parallelized compilation tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 96 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 192 GB of RAM, and 50 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for highly parallel CPU workloads.

tagline: A dedicated ninety-six core AMD EPYC compute instance with a two gigabytes per core memory ratio and fifty gigabits network bandwidth.

192.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for parallel CPU-bound tasks and batch processing
